# sample-plugin

![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/version-1.2.3-blue)

A sample plugin for testing.

<!-- INSTALL:START -->
## Install

```bash
claude plugin add heurema/sample-plugin
```
<!-- INSTALL:END -->

## Quick start

Run the sample command.

## Commands

- `/sample` — run sample

## Privacy

This plugin does not collect or transmit any data.
